title: siler latifolia
intro: Siler latifolia, also known as Korean angelica or siler, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the parsley family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Siler latifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Siler latifolia include tea, extract, and tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
